description: Discover textures and animations around a purchased skeletal mesh, then plan official MassBattleEditor-style naming and optional source-folder organization before VAT/unit authoring.

input_schema.asset_slug: Stable slug used for official naming, for example SK_JapanSoldier.
input_schema.family: Optional organization family from the style profile.
input_schema.source_search_path: Optional shared search root for textures and animations.
input_schema.texture_search_path: Optional texture search root used by FindAndFillOriginalTextures.
input_schema.texture_name_filter: Optional texture asset name filter. Defaults empty so purchased assets can be discovered before renaming.
input_schema.animation_search_path: Optional animation search root used by FindAndFillAnimSequences.
input_schema.animation_name_filter: Optional animation asset name filter. Defaults empty so compatible animations are discovered by skeleton.
input_schema.target_source_package_path: Optional override for where prepared source assets should be moved.
input_schema.move_to_source_folder: Defaults true. If false, assets are renamed in place.

pipeline.description: Resolve source asset folder and official naming from the selected unit management style.
Find texture assets around the purchased skeletal mesh.
Find compatible animation sequences by skeleton.
Rename/move source SkeletalMesh, textures, and animation sequences using MassBattleEditor naming conventions.
